Because director Robert Zemeckis deliberately used performance‑capture so Tom Hanks—his key creative partner—could portray several different characters (hero boy, conductor, hobo, Santa, narrator, etc.), letting a single actor embody multiple facets of the story rather than hiring separate performers.
